data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_0
data.value: If you play this game in High Definition mode, you can have up to four players in split-screen on the same console!

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_1
data.value: Connect extra controllers to your console and press START on them to join a game at any point.

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_48
data.value: minecraftforum has a section dedicated to the Xbox One Edition.

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_44
data.value: You'll get the latest info on this game from 4JStudios and Kappische on twitter!

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_45
data.value: Don't look an Enderman in the eye!

data.name: IDS_TIPS_TRIVIA_4
data.value: We think 4J Studios has removed Herobrine from the Xbox One console game, but we're not too sure.

data.name: IDS_TIPS_TRIVIA_17
data.value: Minecraft: Xbox One Edition broke lots of records!

data.name: IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_MULTIPLAYER
IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_SOCIALMEDIA
IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_CREATIVE
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FLY
data.value: Pressing{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_JUMP*} twice quickly will allow you to fly. To exit flying, repeat the action. To fly faster, push{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_MOVE*} forward twice in rapid succession while flying. When in flying mode, you can hold down{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_JUMP*} to move up and{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_SNEAK*} to move down, or use the D-pad to move up, down, left or right.

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_SELECTDEVICE
data.value: Select Storage Device

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_CHANGEDEVICE
data.value: Change Storage Device

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_VIEW_GAMERCARD
data.value: View Gamer Card

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_VIEW_GAMERPROFILE
data.value: View Gamer Profile

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_INVITE_PARTY
data.value: Invite Xbox LIVE Party

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_CREATIVE
data.value: If you create, load or save a world in Creative Mode, that world will have achievements and leaderboard updates disabled, even if it is then loaded in Survival Mode. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_SAVEDINCREATIVE
data.value: This world has previously been saved in Creative Mode, and it will have achievements and leaderboard updates disabled. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_SAVEDINCREATIVE_CONTINUE
data.value: This world has previously been saved in Creative Mode, and it will have achievements and leaderboard updates disabled.

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_HOST_PRIVILEGES
data.value: If you create, load or save a world with Host Privileges enabled, that world will have achievements and leaderboard updates disabled, even if it is then loaded with those options off. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: IDS_CONNECTION_LOST_LIVE
data.value: Connection to Xbox LIVE was lost. Exiting to the main menu.

data.name: IDS_CONNECTION_LOST_LIVE_NO_EXIT
data.value: Connection to Xbox LIVE was lost.

data.name: IDS_AWARD_AVATAR1
data.value: Hurray - you've been awarded an avatar item - a Minecraft: Xbox One Edition t-shirt! Go to the dashboard to put the t-shirt on your avatar.

data.name: IDS_AWARD_AVATAR2
data.value: Hurray - you've been awarded an avatar item - a Minecraft: Xbox One Edition watch! Go to the dashboard to put the watch on your avatar.

data.name: IDS_AWARD_AVATAR3
data.value: Hurray - you've been awarded an avatar item - a Creeper baseball cap! Go to the dashboard to put the cap on your avatar.

data.name: IDS_AWARD_THEME
data.value: Hurray - you've been awarded the Minecraft: Xbox One Edition theme! Go to the dashboard to select this theme.

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_ACHIEVEMENT_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft: Xbox One Edition trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned an achievement! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft: Xbox One Edition and to play with your friends across the globe through Xbox LIVE. Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_AVATAR_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft: Xbox One Edition trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned an avatar award! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft: Xbox One Edition and to play with your friends across the globe through Xbox LIVE. Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_GAMERPIC_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft: Xbox One Edition trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned a gamerpic! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft: Xbox One Edition and to play with your friends across the globe through Xbox LIVE. Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_THEME_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft: Xbox One Edition trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned a theme! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft: Xbox One Edition and to play with your friends across the globe through Xbox LIVE. Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_ACCEPT_INVITE
data.value: This is the Minecraft: Xbox One Edition trial game. You need the full game to be able to accept this invite. Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_GUEST_TEXT
data.value: Guest players cannot unlock the full game. Please sign in with an Xbox LIVE user ID.

data.name: IDS_LEADERBOARD_GAMERTAG
data.value: Gamertag

data.name: IDS_GROUPNAME_POTIONS_480
data.value: Brewing

data.name: IDS_RETURNEDTOTITLESCREEN_TEXT
data.value: You have been returned to the title screen because your gamer profile was signed out

data.name: IDS_TRIALOVER_TEXT
data.value: You've been playing the Minecraft: Xbox One Edition Trial Game for the maximum time allowed! To continue the fun, would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_FATAL_ERROR_TEXT
data.value: "Minecraft: Xbox One Edition" has failed to load, and cannot continue.

data.name: IDS_NO_MULTIPLAYER_PRIVILEGE_JOIN_TEXT
data.value: Failed to join the game as one or more players are not allowed to play multiplayer games on Xbox LIVE.

data.name: IDS_NO_MULTIPLAYER_PRIVILEGE_HOST_TEXT
data.value: Failed to create an online game as one or more players are not allowed to play multiplayer games on Xbox LIVE. Uncheck the "Online Game" box to start an offline game.

data.name: IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_SINGLE_LOCAL
data.value: You are not allowed to join this game session because your Member Content privilege setting is too restrictive. Please change this setting in the Privacy and Online Settings portion of the Xbox dashboard if you would like to join this session.

data.name: IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_ALL_LOCAL
data.value: You are not allowed to join this game session because one of your local players has a Member Content privilege setting that is too restrictive.

data.name: IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_REMOTE
data.value: You are not allowed to join this game session because a player in the session has a Member Content privilege setting of Friends Only, and you are not on their Friends List.

data.name: IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_CREATE
data.value: You are not allowed to create this game session because one of your local players has a Member Content privilege setting that is too restrictive. Uncheck the "Online Game" box to start an offline game, or change this setting in the Privacy and Online Settings portion of the Xbox dashboard.

data.name: IDS_SAVE_ICON_MESSAGE
data.value: This game has a level autosave feature. When you see the icon above displayed, the game is saving your data. Please do not turn off your Xbox One console while this icon is on-screen.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_HOST_PRIVILEGES
data.value: When enabled, the host can toggle their ability to fly, disable exhaustion, and make themselves invisible from the in-game menu. Disables achievements and leaderboard updates.

data.name: IDS_CHECKBOX_DISPLAY_SPLITSCREENGAMERTAGS
data.value: Splitscreen Gamertags

data.name: IDS_ACHIEVEMENTS
data.value: Achievements

data.name: IDS_LABEL_GAMERTAGS
data.value: Gamertags:

data.name: IDS_IN_GAME_GAMERTAGS
data.value: In-Game Gamertags

data.name: IDS_SOCIAL_DEFAULT_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Look what I made in Minecraft: Xbox One Edition!

data.name: IDS_TITLE_UPDATE_NAME
data.value: Title Update 14

data.name: IDS_PLATFORM_NAME
data.value: Xbox One

data.name: IDS_BACK_BUTTON
data.value: Back

data.name: IDS_HOST_OPTION_DISABLES_ACHIEVEMENTS
data.value: This option disables achievements and leaderboard updates for this world while playing, and if loading it again after saving with this option on.

data.name: IDS_KICK_PLAYER_DESCRIPTION
data.value: For players that are not on the same Xbox One console as the host player, selecting this option will kick the player from the game and any other players on their Xbox One console. This player will not be able to rejoin the game until it is restarted.

data.name: IDS_USING_TRIAL_TEXUREPACK_WARNING
data.value: You are using the trial version of a texture pack. You will have access to the full contents of the texture pack, but you will not be able to save your progress. If you try to save while using the trial version, you will be given the option to purchase the full version.

data.name: IDS_WORLD_SIZE_TITLE_SMALL
data.value: Small

data.name: IDS_WORLD_SIZE_TITLE_MEDIUM
data.value: Medium

data.name: IDS_WORLD_SIZE_TITLE_LARGE
data.value: Large

data.name: IDS_WORLD_SIZE_TITLE_CLASSIC
data.value: Classic

data.name: IDS_GAME_OPTIONS
data.value: Game Options

data.name: IDS_WORLD_SIZE
data.value: World Size

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_SEED
data.value: Enter a seed to generate the same terrain again. Leave blank for a random world.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_WORLD_SIZE
data.value: Select a world size to vary the amount of the world that you can explore.

data.name: IDS_DISABLE_SAVING
data.value: Disable autosave

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_DISABLE_SAVING
data.value: Turn off the constant, automatic saving of the world. If you later choose to save it could take a long time.

data.name: IDS_ERROR_NETWORK
data.value: A network error has occurred.

data.name: IDS_ERROR_NETWORK_TITLE
data.value: Network Error
